meaning: n.情人,爱人vi.爱慕vt.求爱adj.私下签定的
examples: Do you want a drink, sweetheart?
That is a long time ago, sweetheart.
We now know that Slim was in negotiations with Verizon to sell his shares, negotiating his sweetheart deal.
Terry, 29, married childhood sweetheart Toni Poole in 2007 and is the father of twins.
